nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 污染
nodes.summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Blue-faced rail
nodes.summary: Blue-faced rail（Blue-faced rail，学名 Gymnocrex rosenbergii），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、污染。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It has been evaluated as a threatened species since October 1, 2016, by the IUCN Red List due to habitat loss and pollution. By 2000, the estimated population of the blue-faced rail was in the low 2000's to the high 9000's, however it has steadily declined since then
